allow: PowerShell(cd apps\\api; if \(Test-Path "node_modules\\.prisma\\client\\index.d.ts"\) { Select-String -Path "node_modules\\.prisma\\client\\index.d.ts" -Pattern "TenantStatus|InputJsonValue|export type TenantWhereInput|export namespace \\$Enums|const TenantStatus" | Select-Object -First 15 } else { Write-Output "no generated client - running generate"; npx prisma generate 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 10 })

PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\Users\\25000422\\Documents\\project\\upstok\\apps\\api; $env:DATABASE_URL="postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/upstock?schema=public"; $p = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "dist/main.js" -NoNewWindow -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput "boot.out" -RedirectStandardError "boot.err"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; if \(-not $p.HasExited\) { Write-Output "STILL_RUNNING \(listening or retrying\)"; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force } else { Write-Output "EXITED code=$\($p.ExitCode\)" }; Write-Output "---STDOUT---"; Get-Content boot.out -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "---STDERR---"; Get-Content boot.err -Tail 20 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe"\); $exe = $paths | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1; if \($exe\) { Write-Output "Starting: $exe"; Start-Process $exe } else { Write-Output "Docker Desktop.exe not found in standard paths" })

PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\Users\\25000422\\Documents\\project\\upstok; if \(-not \(Test-Path ".env"\)\) { Copy-Item ".env.example" ".env" }; docker compose up -d db redis 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 20)
